title: potentilla canescens f. polyodonta
intro: Potentilla canescens f. polyodonta, also known as the shrubby cinquefoil, is a flowering plant species in the rose family Rosaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Potentilla canescens f. polyodonta may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
